item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 14s LIV is back at the top of the hour on FS1, with Arlo White noting there was a local
item.description:
Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 14s LIV is back at the top of the hour on FS1, with Arlo White noting there was a local power outage in Mexico City.
"Hopefully we're back for the rest of this first round, if the gremlins stay away." 0:16 1

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 9min LIV addresses the outage. Supposed to hit FS1 in four minutes. Cita LIV Golf @livg
item.description:
Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 9min LIV addresses the outage. Supposed to hit FS1 in four minutes. Cita LIV Golf @livgolf_league · 23min We know many of you were tuning in, and we’re sorry for the disruption.
We’re experiencing technical difficulties due to local power outages which is impacting our broadcast feed.
We’re working on a resolution and hope to be back on air as soon as possible. 1 1 803

item.title:
PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 19min That’s how you draw it up
Not a blemish on the scorecard and a one shot lead for Ludvig Åber
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 19min That’s how you draw it up
Not a blemish on the scorecard and a one shot lead for Ludvig Åberg @RBC_Heritage . 3 1 56 13 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 28min #NEW — LIV Golf & The PlF of Saudi Arabia are being sued by The Premier Golf League, a pr
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 28min #NEW — LIV Golf & The PlF of Saudi Arabia are being sued by The Premier Golf League, a proposed breakaway tour that had been initially pitching players back in 2019 as an alternative to the PGA Tour. The league’s concept was for twelve, 4-man teams in a 54-hole, no cut Mostrar más 9 5 100 25 mil
